name: formal-ai-vscode
description: VS Code extension (desktop + web) embedding the formal-ai symbolic chat UI

untrustedWorkspaces.description: The in-process symbolic agent is safe everywhere; the opt-in local server and Docker code execution only run in trusted desktop windows.

formal-ai.server.enabled.markdownDescription: Start a local OpenAI-compatible `formal-ai serve` process and route chat through `POST /v1/chat/completions`. Desktop (Node) host only; ignored in the web host, which always runs the in-process symbolic agent.

formal-ai.server.host.description: Loopback host the local server binds to (desktop host only).

formal-ai.server.port.description: Port the local server binds to (desktop host only).

formal-ai.docker.image.description: Docker image used to sandbox code-execution tool calls (desktop host only, when a permitted tool runs).

formal-ai.tools.allowByDefault.description: Grant tool calls (http_fetch, read_local_file, host shell, and sandboxed code_exec) by default. Off means default-deny until the user opts in.

formal-ai.agent.defaultOn.description: Enable agent mode (which drives tool grants) by default when the chat view opens.

scripts.test: node --test scripts/config.test.mjs scripts/bridge.test.mjs scripts/webview-html.test.mjs scripts/chat-view.test.mjs scripts/server-process.test.mjs && node scripts/smoke.mjs
